sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108454" key="u(poidai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποιδ-αίνω</orth>, <sense id="n108454.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-οιδέω</ref></xr>, dub. cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:6:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.6.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
